creator: kitambi@epicsol.org
text:
All video and sound output from mplayer and k9copy are garbled.  After setting
DVDCSS_VERBOSE to 2, the following output is produced:

libdvdcss debug: opening target `/dev/acd0'
libdvdcss debug: using libc for access
libdvdcss debug: disc is scrambled
libdvdcss debug: requesting AGID
libdvdcss debug: drive authenticated, using variant 0
libdvdcss debug: authentication established
libdvdcss debug: GetASF authenticated, ASF=1
libdvdcss debug: decrypting disc key 57:58:53:20:ea
libdvdcss debug: trying player key 01:af:e3:12:80
libdvdcss debug: decrypted disc key is 2b:36:e4:e9:d7
libdvdcss debug: using CSS key cache dir: /home/kitambi/.dvdcss/V_FOR_VENDETTA-2006050600364200-2b36e4e9d7/
libdvdcss debug: getting title key at block 155608 the classic way
libdvdcss debug: requesting AGID
libdvdcss debug: drive authenticated, using variant 0
libdvdcss debug: authentication established
libdvdcss debug: ioctl ReadTitleKey failed (region mismatch?)
libdvdcss debug: GetASF not authenticated, ASF=0
libdvdcss debug: lost ASF requesting title key
libdvdcss debug: resetting drive and cracking title key
libdvdcss debug: requesting AGID
libdvdcss debug: drive authenticated, using variant 0
libdvdcss debug: authentication established
libdvdcss debug: GetASF authenticated, ASF=1
libdvdcss debug: decrypting disc key 57:58:53:20:ea
libdvdcss debug: trying player key 01:af:e3:12:80
libdvdcss debug: decrypted disc key is 2b:36:e4:e9:d7
libdvdcss debug: cracking title key at block 155608
libdvdcss error: read error
libdvdcss debug: read error at block 155608, resorting to secret arcanes to recover
libdvdcss debug: opening target `/dev/acd0'
libdvdcss debug: using libc for access
libdvdcss error: read error
libdvdcss debug: end of title reached
libdvdcss debug: successful attempts 0/0, scrambled blocks 0/0
libdvdcss debug: title key is 00:00:00:00:00
libdvdcss error: fatal error in vts css key
